Title: SSL Certificate Check Failed
Description: The scanner could not verify the SSL certificate. Error: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed
Recommendation: Make sure the website has a valid SSL/TLS certificate.

Title: Target Unreachable
Description: The scanner could not reach the target. Error: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.example.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by NameResolutionError("<urllib3.connection.HTTPSConnection object at 0x00000225AAF29E80>: Failed to resolve 'api.example.com' ([Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed)"))
Recommendation: Check if the target URL is correct and accessible.
